     the Fermi energy is    -0.2078 ev

!    total energy              =   -7324.00643703 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          4.3E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.18541190 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -7323.82102512 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -149560.73922456 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   75488.66767844 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2813.87026996 Ry

     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.46853295 Ry
